zh.Carnforth, Lancaster, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾卡福斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Washington I於1265年出生在英國藍卡爾卡福斯時，他的父親William of Washington24歲，母親Margaret de Morville31歲。他於1292年與Joan Strickland在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他於1297年登記服兵役。他去世於1324年在英國藍卡爾享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Washington I于1265年出生在英国藍卡爾卡福斯时，他的父亲William of Washington24岁，母亲Margaret de Morville31岁。他于1292年与Joan Strickland在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他于1297年登记服兵役。他去世于1324年在英国藍卡爾享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Washington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Washington in Durham, possibly also from Washington in Sussex. The Durham placename derives from an Old English personal name Hwassa, Hwæssa + the Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. In North America, this surname is by far most common among African Americans (see 2 below).

African American: from the personal name Washington (or George Washington), adopted in honor of George Washington, the 1st president of the US; or adoption of the surname in 1 above, in most cases probably for the same reason.

History: George Washington (1732–99), 1st president of the US (1789–97), was born at Bridges Creek, VA. His great-grandfather had emigrated from Dillicar in Westmorland in 1658. George Washington was a slaveowner, but he became troubled with the institution of slavery. Shortly before his death he decided that his slaves have to be freed after the death of his wife. — With the passage of time, the surname Washington has come to be borne by more African Americans (around 90% of all bearers) than English-Americans. A prominent example was the educator Booker T. Washington (1856–1915), born a slave in VA, who adopted his surname from his stepfather, Washington Ferguson.

variants.name: President
meanings: African American: from the English vocabulary word president, probably adopted as a surname in honor of one of the early presidents of the US (compare Washington and Jefferson ) or simply because of the importance of the presidential function.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Washington I was born in 1265, in Carnforth, Lancashire, England, his father, William of Washington, was 24 and his mother, Margaret de Morville, was 31. He married Joan Strickland in 1292, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He registered for military service in 1297. He died in 1324, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Washington I est né en 1265, à Carnforth, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William of Washington, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Morville, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Joan Strickland en 1292, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1297. Il est décédé en 1324, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Washington I 1265 in Carnforth, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William of Washington 24 und seine Mutter Margaret de Morville 31. Er hat 1292 in Yorkshire, England Joan Strickland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er hat sich 1297 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1324 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Washington I è nato il nel 1265 nel Carnforth, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, William of Washington, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Morville, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Joan Strickland nel 1292, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1297. Morì nel 1324, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Washington Iが1265年にイギリスランカシュアイアカーンフォースで生まれた時，父William of Washingtonは24歳，母Margaret de Morvilleは31歳であった。1292年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでJoan Stricklandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1297年に兵役登録をした。彼は1324年にイギリスランカシュアイアで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Washington I(이)가 1265년 영국 랭카실르 카른포스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William of Washington(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Morville(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1292년 영국 요르크실르에서 Joan Strickland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1297년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1324년 영국 랭카실르에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Carnforth, Lancaster, England: Carnforth, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Washington I nasceu em 1265, em Carnforth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William of Washington, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Morville, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Strickland em 1292, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1297. Ele faleceu em 1324, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Washington I родился в 1265 г. в местности карнфорт, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени William of Washington было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Morville, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Strickland в 1292 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. В 1297 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1324 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Washington I nació en 1265, en Carnforth, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William of Washington, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret de Morville, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Joan Strickland en 1292, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1297. Murió en 1324, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años.
